stemHtml:
A loaded aircraft has its centre of gravity (CG) 35 inches aft of the datum, and its mass is 4 500 lb. A last minute load of 334 lb is placed on board 20 inches forward of the datum.

Determine the new position of the CG:

options.a: 31.6 inches forward of the datum.
options.b: 31.2 inches aft of the datum.
options.c: 33.62 inches forward of the datum.
